query:
SELECT EXISTS(
                SELECT 1 FROM workspaces w
                JOIN tasks t ON w.task_id = t.id
                JOIN sessions s ON w.id = s.workspace_id
                JOIN execution_processes ep ON s.id = ep.session_id
                WHERE t.project_id = $1
                  AND w.mode = 'direct'
                  AND ep.status = 'running'
            ) as "exists!: bool"
